string.name: what_s_new_toast
string.font:
- This is an Alpha release. Some features may not work as expected. 
 - Introduced MilkyGlass, a liquid glass surface effect inspired by Apple. 
 - Added functionality to the Library screen. 
 - Queue and recent tracks are now persistent. 
 - This version is intended for testing purposes only. Please use with caution. 
 - Enjoy, and happy testing!

item.font:
We've enhanced the functionality of the app. 
 We're utilizing the new, advanced NowPlaying API for real-time updates regarding playback metadata state. 
 We've added a new Dynamic Widget that automatically adjusts to size. 
 More App Widget styles are coming soon.
